'''Goldies''' were domestic fish, sometimes used to create a peaceful atmosphere in a room. Some were kept at the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}
